content:
# Session 17 (iter-017) — Review Summary

## Metadata
- Iter / session: 017 / session_17. Prover model: opus. One lane (D3′, `TensorObjSubstrate.lean`).
- Sorry count: **2 → 2** (no net change). File **GREEN** at end (8321 jobs, exit 0; verified by prover ×3).
- Sorries: L719 `exists_tensorObj_inverse` (deferred import-cycle, untouched); L3626 `hcore2`
  residual inside `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (L3144).
- DUAL retired (closed iter-015). D3′ is the single live route.

## Target: `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` — PARTIAL (real structural advance)

Step (iii) (the interleaved Sq3/Sq4 merge) was decomposed and largely closed this iter. Residual
narrowed from "whole step (iii)" to the single folded **presheaf** core `hcore2`.

### What landed (all compiled + verified GREEN)
1. **RED→GREEN repair (entry).** File failed to build on entry: a stray
   `erw [(SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (...)).hom.naturality_assoc]` + a forced-mismatch
   probe left by the previous lane caused `(deterministic) timeout at whnf (3200000 heartbeats)` at
   ~L3037. The PROGRESS/PROGRESS-claimed "GREEN" was **stale**. First action removed the bombing `erw`
   and restored a compiling `sorry`. (This file is imported by `DualInverse.lean`, so RED blocks the
   whole downstream cone.)
2. **Step (iii)-a — S1^h slide SPLICED** via new `comp_slide_nested` applied by `refine … hslide ?_`.
   Every keyed-matching tactic (`simp only [Category.assoc]`, `rw`/`erw [reassoc_of% hslide]`) whnf-bombs
   the post-step-(ii) `SheafOfModules`-instance boundary; the generic single-`[Category C]` lemma applied
   by `refine` (assignment-only unification) crosses it. Required re-spelling `hslide`'s intermediate
   object via `show … from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom`.
3. **Step (iii)-b.1 — prefix cancel** via new `comp_cancel_three_lr … rfl rfl rfl ?_` (three leaf defeqs
   for the `SheafOfModules`-vs-`Scheme.Modules` pullback spellings discharge by `rfl` — small terms, no
   big-composite whnf). Reduces to the merged `hcore`.
4. **Step (iii)-b.2 — slide of V** (`S1_h` presheaf-args → `S1_h''` sheaf-args) via new
   `comp_slide_three` + `map_comp_slide`. `hcomb` closed by naturality of `sheafificationCompPullback h`
   at the connecting morphism `gg = tensorHom(η⊗η) ≫ tensorHom(forget pVI.hom)`, with
   `hg : a_Y.map gg = S3_f ≫ S4_f` proved `exact a_Y.map_comp _ _` (defeq — NOT `rw [Functor.map_comp]`,
   the `≫` lives in the `forget₂`-carrier instance) then `congr 1; exact (sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq' _ _).symm`.
   Iteration gotchas resolved: `⊗ₘ` needed explicit `(C := PresheafOfModules (Y.presheaf ⋙ forget₂ …))`
   (the `Sheaf.val` carrier can't synthesize the monoidal instance); `vtail` supplied explicitly to
   `comp_slide_three` (not determined by the conclusion).

### Residual — `hcore2` (the folded Sq3/Sq4 presheaf core, L3626)
A genuine D1′-level presheaf chase. Verbatim goal extracted (forced type-mismatch) and documented
in-proof; 3-tool recipe (δ-naturality `presheaf_pullback_oplaxmonoidal` + bifunctoriality
`tensorHom_comp_tensorHom` + `pullbackValIso` factorisation). See task_result and milestones for the
full goal + recipe. Why stopped: each build ~10 min and **LSP MCP unwired** (goals only via forced
type-mismatch builds), so iterating the multi-`erw` fold + presheaf close blind was not completable.

## New helpers (4, all `private`, all compile, all genuinely used — aud017-confirmed non-vacuous)
`comp_slide_nested` (L3000), `comp_cancel_three_lr` (L3017), `comp_slide_three` (L3042),
`map_comp_slide` (L3059). All are instance-agnostic abstract-category plumbing (no scheme/sheaf
content) — same exemption class as `comp_cancel_mid`; tos017 confirms **no blueprint pin needed**.

## Recurring pattern (4th consecutive iter)
iters 014–017 each decompose one strictly-deeper sub-step of `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` while the
sorry count stays 2→2 (i@015, ii@016, iii-a/b.1/b.2@017). Helper ratio is ~1:1 (4 helpers ↔ 3 spliced
sub-steps), all non-vacuous. progress-critic conv017 flagged CHURNING (mechanical PARTIAL×4); planner
executed the named corrective (blueprint expansion fa017) and partially rebutted. **This is genuine
narrowing, not churn** — but the residual is now a single fully-characterised presheaf identity, so the
next iter is the natural convergence test: if `hcore2` does not close (or spawns yet another boundary
class), escalate rather than add a 5th helper round.

## Review audits dispatched
- **lean-auditor (aud017):** PASS, 0 must-fix / 6 major / 2 minor. 4 new helpers non-vacuous + used;
  `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` honest tactic code with one legit `sorry`; header sorry-count accurate.
  6 major = **stale .lean docs** in non-active files (`DualInverse.lean` header/L200 describe
  `sliceDualTransport` sorry as open — it's 0 sorries; `LineBundlePullback.lean` header/docstrings
  describe removed sorries; `Vestigial.lean` lists `isLocallyInjective_whiskerLeft_of_W` as open — it's
  proved; `RelPicFunctor.lean` `PicSharp := const PUnit` documented dependency-gated stub). 2 minor =
  forward-dated iter label `TensorObjSubstrate.lean:51` ("iter-018"), stale "pending" wording. Report:
  `task_results/lean-auditor-aud017.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker (tos017):** clean, 0 must-fix / 1 major / 2 minor. Signature matches; proof
  structure matches blueprint fa017 prose; no placeholder bodies. MAJOR = **orphaned Sq3/Sq4 blueprint
  targets** `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_comp` / `pullbackValIso_comp` are `\lean{}`-pinned to non-existent
  decls; the merged `hcore2` approach will not build them. Minor = `sheafifyMap_δcomp_split` proof-block
  `\leanok` absent (sync skips `private`); `pullbackValIso` reconciliation prose slightly underspecified.
  Report: `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-tos017.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:sheafify_tensor_unit_iso_comp`: added `% NOTE:` — `\lean{}` pin
  target absent from Lean; merged `hcore2` approach absorbs this brick inline; NOT a prerequisite for the
  next prover. (tos017 major.)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp`: added `% NOTE:` — same (target absent,
  folded into `hcore2`, not a prerequisite). (tos017 major.)

No `\leanok` manual override applied. `sheafifyMap_δcomp_split` proof-block `\leanok` (tos017 minor):
left to `sync_leanok` — the decl is `private` and sync added +1 marker this iter (sha a8bd637); not
confidently a sync error, so no manual override. Flagged in recommendations.

## Markers / doctor / sync
- `sync_leanok` (iter 17, sha a8bd637): **+1 / −0**, `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`. Deterministic
  green-fallout; not laundering. No manual override needed.
- blueprint-doctor: **clean** (no orphan chapters, no broken `\ref`/`\uses`, no axioms). Note: the doctor
  does NOT check `\lean{}` targets, so the two orphaned Sq3/Sq4 `\lean{}` pins (tos017) are invisible to
  it — surfaced here + via the `% NOTE:` markers above.
- dag unmatched = **98** (incl. the 5 generic helpers `comp_cancel_mid` + 4 new — all exempt
  instance-plumbing per tos017). See recommendations for the full list.

## Key findings (durable → also in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
- The `comp_cancel_mid`+`exact` device generalises to a **family** of generic single-`[Category C]`
  lemmas (slide / 3-prefix-cancel / merge-then-slide) applied by `refine`/`exact`, each mirroring the
  goal's nesting — this is the working tool for every instance-boundary crossing in the D3′ merge. `rw`/
  `simp`/`erw` (incl. `reassoc_of%`) all whnf-bomb; do the algebra on clean abstract vars instead.
- Stray-`erw` left in a `sorry`-bodied proof can leave the file RED while PROGRESS reports GREEN — verify
  build ground-truth on entry; never trust an inherited GREEN claim across the prover hand-off.
